# Copilot Instructions for ijosh.com

## Project Overview

This is **ijosh.com** - a personal portfolio website for Josh Vaughen, an engineer, traveler, and fitness enthusiast. The site is built with Hugo (static site generator) and deployed to Cloudflare Pages. It was migrated from SquareSpace and uses a modified "Split" theme with a custom color scheme.

## Tech Stack

- **Static Site Generator**: Hugo (JAMstack architecture)
- **Theme**: "Split" theme (heavily customized, licensed to remove attribution)
- **Hosting**: Cloudflare Pages
- **Analytics**: Cloudflare Web Analytics
- **Styling**: SCSS (compiled to CSS)
- **Fonts**: Google Fonts (Montserrat, Lora)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome

## Architecture & Structure

### Key Directories

- `/content/` - Markdown content files with front matter
  - `_index.md` - Main homepage content
- `/themes/split/` - Custom theme based on Split theme
  - `/layouts/` - Hugo template files
  - `/static/assets/` - SCSS source files
- `/static/` - Static assets (images, etc.)
- `/public/` - Generated site (ignored in git, auto-generated by Hugo)
- `/config.toml` - Main Hugo configuration

### Content Structure

The site is a **single-page personal portfolio** with:
- Large profile image on the left (50% width)
- Content section on the right (50% width) containing:
  - Name and tagline
  - Location with icon
  - Emojis/identity badges
  - Bio content (from Markdown)
  - Social connection buttons

## Configuration Deep Dive

### config.toml Settings

```toml
baseURL = "https://ijosh.com/"
theme = "split"
disableKinds = ["section", "taxonomy", "taxonomyTerm", "RSS"]
```

**Important**: The site disables sections, taxonomies, and RSS since it's a single-page site.

### Feature Flags in config.toml

```toml
[params.showemail]
  enable = true

[params.showgithub]
  enable = true

[params.showtwitter]
  enable = false  # Currently disabled

[params.showlocation]
  enable = true

[params.showemojis]
  enable = true
```

These flags control which social icons and profile elements display.

### Content Front Matter

The main content file ([content/_index.md](content/_index.md)) uses these front matter fields:
- `title` - Person's name
- `tagline` - Professional tagline/subtitle
- `location` - Geographic location
- `emojis` - Identity/flag emojis

## Theme Customization

### Layout Files

1. **[themes/split/layouts/_default/baseof.html](themes/split/layouts/_default/baseof.html)** - Base template
   - Split-screen layout container
   - Conditional image/video display
   - Includes partials for intro, bio, buttons, footer

2. **[themes/split/layouts/index.html](themes/split/layouts/index.html)** - Homepage template
   - Includes bio and buttons partials

3. **[themes/split/layouts/_default/single.html](themes/split/layouts/_default/single.html)** - Single page template (currently empty)

### Partials

Located in [themes/split/layouts/partials/](themes/split/layouts/partials/):

1. **head.html** - HTML head with SEO, Open Graph, social meta tags
   - Google Analytics integration (disabled for localhost)
   - Cloudflare Web Analytics beacon
   - Favicon and share image configuration
   - Schema.org structured data

2. **intro.html** - Name, tagline, location, emojis section
   - Uses Font Awesome icons for location and ID badge

3. **bio.html** - Main content area (renders `.Content` from Markdown)

4. **buttons.html** - Social connection buttons
   - Hardcoded Instagram link as main "Connect" button
   - Icon-based buttons for: Instagram, LinkedIn, GitHub, X/Twitter, Email
   - Controlled by feature flags in config.toml

5. **footer.html** - Footer credit (currently empty, license purchased to remove attribution)

### Styling Architecture

**SCSS Source Files** (in [public/assets/sass/](public/assets/sass/)):

1. **00-reset.scss** - Eric Meyer's CSS Reset
2. **01-content.scss** - Main styles with variables and layout
3. **split.scss** - Theme compilation file

**Custom CSS** ([public/css/style.css](public/css/style.css)):
- Button styles (dark/light variants)
- Social icon layout
- Flexbox containers for buttons

### Color Scheme (Custom)

```scss
$color-background : #061C30;  // Dark blue background
$color-text       : #848d96;  // Light gray text
$color-link       : #848d96;  // Link color
$color-link-hover : #CA486d;  // Pink hover color
$color-maverick   : #47bec7;  // Teal accent (used for name)
$color-tagline    : #CCCCCC;  // Light tagline color
```

These colors are custom and deviate from the original Split theme to match the previous SquareSpace design.

### Responsive Breakpoints

```scss
$bp-smallish : 1200px;
$bp-tablet   : 800px;
$bp-mobile   : 500px;
```

At tablet breakpoint (800px), the layout switches from split-screen to stacked vertical layout.

## Deployment

### Cloudflare Pages Integration

- **Auto-deployment**: Pushes to `master` branch trigger automatic deployments
- **Development workflow**: Work in feature branches, merge to master for production
- **Analytics**: Cloudflare Web Analytics token embedded in head partial

### Build Command

Hugo generates the site:
```bash
hugo
```

Output goes to `/public/` directory (which is gitignored).

## Social Links & Contact

**Hardcoded Social Links** (in [buttons.html](themes/split/layouts/partials/buttons.html)):
- Instagram: `https://instagram.com/joshthings`
- LinkedIn: `https://linkedin.com/in/ijosh`
- GitHub: `https://github.com/jshvn`
- X/Twitter: `https://x.com/dvnll` (disabled by default)
- Email: `josh@vaughen.net`

**Note**: These are hardcoded in the template, not in config.toml.

## Images & Assets

### Profile Image
- **File**: `static/images/profile.webp`
- **Format**: WebP (modern, compressed)
- **Usage**: Background image for left panel, Open Graph share image
- **Position**: Center center
- **Dimensions**: 1500x2250 (Open Graph)

### Favicon
- **File**: `static/images/favicon.png`

## SEO & Social Sharing

### Meta Tags Configured
- Open Graph (Facebook, LinkedIn)
- Twitter Cards (summary_large_image)
- Schema.org structured data (WebSite type)
- Canonical URL
- Author, description, robots meta tags

### Key Settings
```toml
author = "Josh Vaughen"
description = "Josh Vaughen is a machine learning engineer with a fierce passion for solo travel and fitness."
shareImage = "images/profile.webp"
twitterHandle = "dvnll"
```

## Development Guidelines

### When Modifying Content
1. Edit [content/_index.md](content/_index.md) for bio text
2. Update front matter for name, tagline, location, emojis
3. Run `hugo` or `hugo server` to preview
4. Commit and push to feature branch
5. Merge to master for production deployment

### When Modifying Layout
1. Edit files in [themes/split/layouts/](themes/split/layouts/)
2. Partials are modular - change specific partials without touching base template
3. Test responsive behavior at all breakpoints (1200px, 800px, 500px)

### When Modifying Styles
1. Edit SCSS files in [public/assets/sass/](public/assets/sass/)
2. Main customizations go in `01-content.scss`
3. Button customizations go in [public/css/style.css](public/css/style.css)
4. Recompile SCSS to CSS (Hugo handles this)
5. Test color contrast and accessibility

### When Updating Social Links
1. Edit [themes/split/layouts/partials/buttons.html](themes/split/layouts/partials/buttons.html)
2. Add/remove icon links as needed
3. Update feature flags in [config.toml](config.toml) if adding new platform
4. Ensure Font Awesome classes are correct (use `fab` for brands, `far` for regular, `fa-solid` for solid)

### When Adding New Pages
**Note**: This is currently a single-page site with sections/taxonomies disabled. To add pages:
1. Re-enable kinds in [config.toml](config.toml)
2. Create content files in `/content/`
3. Update navigation (would need to add navigation partial)
4. Modify [themes/split/layouts/_default/single.html](themes/split/layouts/_default/single.html) template

## Common Tasks

### Local Development
```bash
hugo server -D  # Serves at http://localhost:1313
```

### Build for Production
```bash
hugo  # Generates site in /public/
```

### Update Hugo Configuration
Edit [config.toml](config.toml) for:
- Site metadata
- Feature flags
- Visual settings
- SEO parameters

### Update Analytics
- **Cloudflare token** is in [themes/split/layouts/partials/head.html](themes/split/layouts/partials/head.html)
- **Google Analytics** configured via Hugo's built-in template (only active in production)

## Font Awesome Integration

**Current Usage**:
- Location icon: `fa-solid fa-location-dot`
- ID badge icon: `fa-solid fa-id-badge`
- Instagram: `fab fa-instagram`
- LinkedIn: `fab fa-linkedin-in`
- GitHub: `fab fa-github`
- X/Twitter: `fab fa-x-twitter`
- Email: `far fa-envelope`

**Note**: Font Awesome CDN is loaded (not visible in current files, likely in compiled CSS or external source).

## Known Issues & Considerations

1. **Public directory committed**: The `/public/` directory is present in the repo but should be gitignored (it is in .gitignore). Clean this up if causing issues.

2. **Hardcoded links**: Social links are hardcoded in templates rather than config.toml. Consider moving to config for easier updates.

3. **Empty single.html**: The single page template is empty since this is a one-page site. If adding blog posts or pages, this needs implementation.

4. **Twitter disabled**: The X/Twitter link exists but is disabled via config flag. Enable if needed.

5. **License purchased**: The Split theme license was purchased, so attribution can be removed (already done in footer).

## Typography

- **Headings/Body**: Montserrat (400, 600 weights)
- **Bio content**: Lora (serif font for readability)
- **Letter spacing**: Tight on large headings (-2px on 64px intro text)

## Animation

Simple fade-in animation on page load:
```scss
animation: fadein 1s;
```

## Browser Support

- Modern browsers (ES6+)
- Responsive design for mobile, tablet, desktop
- WebP image format (ensure fallback if needed)

## File Organization

```
ijosh.com/
├── config.toml              # Main configuration
├── content/                 # Markdown content
│   └── _index.md           # Homepage content
├── static/                  # Static assets
│   └── images/             # Images (profile, favicon)
├── themes/split/           # Custom theme
│   ├── layouts/            # Template files
│   │   ├── _default/       # Default templates
│   │   └── partials/       # Reusable components
│   └── static/assets/      # Theme assets
└── public/                  # Generated site (gitignored)
```

## Future Modernization Considerations

When updating/modernizing this site, consider:
1. **Move social links to config.toml** for easier management
2. **Add build pipeline** for SCSS compilation and asset optimization
3. **Implement Hugo Pipes** for asset processing
4. **Add dark mode toggle** (popular modern feature)
5. **Optimize images** with Hugo's image processing
6. **Add blog section** if content creation desired
7. **Implement CSP headers** for security
8. **Add RSS feed** if re-enabling sections
9. **Consider Hugo modules** instead of theme directory
10. **Update Font Awesome** to latest version and use CDN or bundle
11. **Add accessibility improvements** (ARIA labels, focus states)
12. **Implement lazy loading** for images
13. **Add sitemap priority** per page (currently global)
14. **Consider Tailwind CSS** or modern CSS framework migration
